WhyItMatters: Post-authentication cloud activity can show session abuse, data access, or control gaps.
ReviewSteps: Check downloads, uploads, sharing, OAuth activity, and unusual apps.
Compare device trust and session control coverage.
Review DLP visibility for sensitive data movement.
Validate whether behavior is expected for the user role.
RecommendedActions: Review Defender for Cloud Apps session policies.
Review DLP coverage for SharePoint, OneDrive, and cloud apps.
